title: festuca ovina var. trachyphylla
intro: Festuca ovina var. trachyphylla, commonly known as sheep's fescue, is a plant species that belongs to the grass family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Festuca ovina var. trachyphylla include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to promote respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Festuca ovina var. trachyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
